description: The first six leaves of a copy of the Ghurar al-Balāgha of Hilāl al-Ṣābi' — a book of formularies for letter-writing — copied in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Edited by Gottheil and discussed by Cohen in "Correspondence and Social Control in the Jewish Communities of the Islamic World," Jewish History 1, no. 2 (1986): 39-48.
tags: Formulary, literary with documentary value, Halfon b. Menashshe
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
